function.name: exa_search
function.description: Search the web using Exa AI. Returns relevant web pages with titles, URLs, and optionally text content. Supports neural (meaning-based) and keyword search modes.

query.description: The search query. For neural mode, use natural language descriptions of what you're looking for. For keyword mode, use traditional search terms.

num_results.description: Number of results to return (1-50). Default: 10.

type.description: Search type. 'neural' for semantic/meaning-based search, 'keyword' for traditional keyword matching, 'auto' to let Exa decide. Default: 'auto'.

include_text.description: Whether to include page text content in results. Default: false (faster). Set true to get page content inline.

include_domains.description: Only return results from these domains (e.g. ['github.com', 'stackoverflow.com']).

start_published_date.description: Only return results published after this date (ISO format, e.g. '2024-01-01').

function.name: exa_get_contents
function.description: Fetch the text content of one or more web pages by their URLs. Useful for reading articles, documentation, or any web page content.

urls.description: List of URLs to fetch content from (max 10).

max_characters.description: Maximum characters of text to extract per page. Default: 3000. Max: 10000.

function.name: exa_find_similar
function.description: Find web pages similar to a given URL. Useful for discovering related content, alternatives, or competitors.

url.description: The reference URL to find similar pages for.

num_results.description: Number of similar results to return (1-50). Default: 10.

include_text.description: Whether to include page text content in results. Default: false.

include_domains.description: Only return results from these domains.
